title: calluna vulgaris var. hirsuta
intro: Calluna vulgaris var. hirsuta, also known as hairy heather, is a variety of the calluna vulgaris plant, which is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of hairy heather include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of hairy heather include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and bronchitis. Hairy heather can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
